channel.title: HackerNews 日本語まとめ & AI要約
channel.description: HackerNewsのトップ記事を毎日日本語翻訳・AI要約して配信

item.title: 2026年7月18日（23:00取得） HackerNews トップ記事
item.description: #1 AWS: Inaccurate Estimated Billing Data – $1.7 billion #2 Mozilla: The state of open source AI #3 First atmosphere found on Earth-like planet in habitable zone of distant star #4 A Road to Lisp: Which Lisp #5 Three ways people respond to a problem (other than solving it) #6 Claude Code: Anatomy of a Misfeature #7 Show HN: Watch bots interact with an SSH honeypot in real time #8 Minikotlin #9 Manufact (YC S25) Is Hiring a Senior infra engineer to build the MCP cloud #10 AI Meets Cryptography 2: What AI Found in OpenVM's ZkVM

item.title: 2026年7月18日（12:00取得） HackerNews トップ記事
item.description: #1 Kaiser nurses say AI, workplace surveillance are making their jobs, care worse #2 AWS: Inaccurate Estimated Billing Data – $1.7 billion #3 Thanks HN for 15 years of support and helping me find my life's work #4 Reviving a 15-year-old netbook with Arch Linux #5 The Zilog Z80 has turned 50 #6 First atmosphere found on Earth-like planet in habitable zone of distant star #7 Shipping OpenStrike: A Counter-Strike-Shaped FPS on a 2004 Handheld #8 Moonstone: Modern, cross-platform Lua runtime and package manager written in Zig #9 I Started a "Dirt Notebook" #10 TP-Link Kasa cameras leaked home GPS via unauthenticated UDP for 6 years

item.title: 2026年7月18日（07:00取得） HackerNews トップ記事
item.description: #1 Kaiser nurses say AI, workplace surveillance are making their jobs, care worse #2 The Zilog Z80 has turned 50 #3 AWS: Inaccurate Estimated Billing Data – $1.7 billion #4 Thanks HN for 15 years of support and helping me find my life's work #5 First atmosphere found on Earth-like planet in habitable zone of distant star #6 Learning a few things about running SQLite #7 Kimi K3, and what we can still learn from the pelican benchmark #8 Frame – Linux X server in Assembly #9 FAA lets Boeing sign off on 737 MAX, 787 airworthiness certificates again #10 Lobste.rs is now running on SQLite

item.title: 2026年7月17日（23:00取得） HackerNews トップ記事
item.description: #1 Kimi K3 is now live #2 OnePlus halts operations in USA and Europe #3 Goes-19 weather satellite enters Safe Hold mode #4 Let's Build PlanetScale from Scratch: Infrastructure #5 How Our Rust-to-Zig Rewrite Is Going #6 Sony Deletes a Bunch More Movies from the Accounts of People Who 'Bought' Them #7 Ente – Opening Our Books #8 Where are YC founders now? OpenAI and Anthropic, mostly #9 The lost joy of music piracy #10 Show HN: I've built a words game based on binary search
